description: The Minister’s responsibilities are: Border Security Command: reducing small boat arrivals and organised immigration crime reducing the asylum caseload, exiting hotels and reducing the supported population Immigration Enforcement: Increasing returns (including FNOs), immigration detention estate expansion, illegal working asylum, illegal migration and returns policy, safe and legal policy and refugee resettlement policy reducing net migration: legal migration policy tackling visa abuse innovative solutions Immigration White Paper implementation European Entry Exit System modern slavery policy as it relates to immigration status

details.body:
The Minister’s responsibilities are:

  • Border Security Command: reducing small boat arrivals and organised immigration crime
  • reducing the asylum caseload, exiting hotels and reducing the supported population
  • Immigration Enforcement: Increasing returns (including FNOs), immigration detention estate expansion, illegal working
  • asylum, illegal migration and returns policy, safe and legal policy and refugee resettlement policy
  • reducing net migration: legal migration policy
  • tackling visa abuse
  • innovative solutions
  • Immigration White Paper implementation
  • European Entry Exit System
  • modern slavery policy as it relates to immigration status

available_translations.title: Minister of State (Minister for Border Security and Asylum)

details.body:
Alex Norris was apppointed Minister of State at the Home Office on 6 September 2025.

He was previously Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government between 9 July 2024 and 6 September 2025.

He has been the MP for Nottingham North and Kimberley (and its predecessor Nottingham North) since June 2017.

The Minister’s responsibilities are:

  • Border Security Command: reducing small boat arrivals and organised immigration crime
  • reducing the asylum caseload, exiting hotels and reducing the supported population
  • Immigration Enforcement: Increasing returns (including FNOs), immigration detention estate expansion, illegal working
  • asylum, illegal migration and returns policy, safe and legal policy and refugee resettlement policy
  • reducing net migration: legal migration policy
  • tackling visa abuse
  • innovative solutions
  • Immigration White Paper implementation
  • European Entry Exit System
  • modern slavery policy as it relates to immigration status

role.title: Minister of State (Minister for Border Security and Asylum)
